name: 0xmanel--ask-claude-skill
description: Delegate a task to Claude Code CLI and immediately report the result back in chat. Supports persistent sessions — Claude Code remembers previous context within the same workdir. Use when the user asks to run Claude, delegate a coding task, continue a previous Claude session, or any task benefiting from Claude Code's tools (file editing, code analysis, bash, etc.). ALWAYS run synchronously and ALWAYS include the result in your reply.
